commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Crabbox setup metadata, a Crabbox skill, a hydrate workflow, actionlint and CODEOWNERS files, and package scripts for Crabbox and changed-check aliases.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a user bug. The PR blocker is source-reproducible by comparing the added skill instructions with the acpx tree, where scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs and .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml are absent.
commands.review_followup: The concrete skill-path defect is repairable, but the self-hosted runner and copied-skill policy questions require maintainer/security judgment before merge.

target.title: chore: add constrained Crabbox setup
target.body:
## Summary

- add a narrowed Crabbox setup for acpx without reintroducing the closed broad CodeQL/stale baseline
- constrain the hydrate workflow to the trusted Crabbox runner labels: `self-hosted`, `crabbox`, `openclaw`, `acpx`, plus the dynamic lease label
- add CODEOWNERS coverage for automation/package/runtime surfaces and actionlint config for the custom Crabbox labels
- add package scripts expected by the copied OpenClaw Crabbox skill while preserving that skill byte-for-byte

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm run format:check`
- `actionlint .github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml`
- `ruby -e 'require "yaml"; ARGV.each { |path| YAML.load_file(path) }' .crabbox.yaml .github/actionlint.yaml .github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml`
- Crabbox CLI help checked for `run`, `warmup`, `actions hydrate`, and `stop`
- verified Crabbox skill SHA-256 matches openclaw/openclaw: `ed512c0b0385fae7f6c5c14a7e9e6236ab68936506687a99ca976873492bdc43`
- autoreview rerun with focused setup checks: tests passed; review still flags OpenClaw-specific Testbox wording inside the copied skill, intentionally kept because this remediation must use the OpenClaw Crabbox skill verbatim

`pnpm run check` was attempted by autoreview and reached 707 passing tests before failing in `pnpm run mutate` under local Node 26 with a yargs ESM `require is not defined` error. That is unrelated to this setup-only patch; CI normally runs mutation on Node 22.

## Scope note

This replaces the closed broad baseline PR shape. It deliberately does not add CodeQL or stale automation; those are separate policy decisions after the previous broad PR was closed as not wanted as-is.
